name: |~ Illuminate Overseer | Calypso's Collapse, brought to you by Calamari ~|
description:
Helldivers, the Illuminate menace returns to try and disrupt democracy once again. It's your job to prevent the squids from their tyrannical pursuit.

Lowkey, I'd love to just put my head between them thighs. She could definitely crush a watermelon between her thighs, and well, just go ahead and call my head a watermelon.

--------Before You Use Info, also known as Bot and World Info--------

She's an Illuminate, as you have likely guessed. Because of this, she's tall(8'2", aka 249cm), VERY strong, and an alien. Damn squid.

As referenced by the name, the scenario takes place in a populated area of Calypso, or rather ex-populated area of Calypso. This is DURING the initial invasion of Calypso, so it's still a very active warzone.

Oh, and rather obviously, this takes place in the Helldivers 2 universe, though a little different since well... no overseer in the game is this hot.

--------🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯--------

Domination, alien girl, muscular girl, tall girl... you get the idea.

And for the opening message, gore, violence, death. Not great times.

--------Yap Part--------

Big surprise, I didn't take another month, and it also isn't another giantess. Pretty shocking, I know.

Not much to say, other than making this bot makes me want to play Helldivers 2 again.

Oh, and next bot (whenever that will be) should be small character. Keyword is should, since if I take too long on it I'll switch to another character first.

--------Ending Message from the Creator--------

Thank you @Dufywel for the request... it only took me over a month to get to it.👍 Lightwork.

When it comes to interacting with her, I'd recommend either being a Helldiver, an SEAF soldier, or a civilian/scientist. She'll act differently depending on which one you choose, so it's worth keeping in mind. Hell, with how I wrote the opening message, you could totally be a fellow Illuminate, that is if you hate democracy. I'll know. Just fair warning.

Dear peoples who happen to use this bot, have fun doing whatever with her... try not to die <3.
creator: brugman445
